steps.expected: Game page loads with a 5×5 grid
steps.observed: Game page loaded successfully with a 5×5 grid layout
25 button elements found (excluding New Game and Share buttons)

assertions.title: Square text is readable and not truncated

steps.action: Extract full text content of all 25 squares via JS eval
steps.expected: All texts are complete and non-empty
steps.observed: All 25 squares contain complete, readable text labels with no truncation

steps.expected: No text overflow beyond square boundaries
steps.observed: All squares report hasOverflow: false (scrollWidth <= clientWidth and scrollHeight <= clientHeight)

sampleTexts: Gets someone a job / to SF
Goes "WHAT THE FUCK!?!" at some company
Does the "I'm not mad, I'm just disappointed" look
Says "let me just..." then spends 20 minutes on it

steps.action: Measure width and height of all 25 squares via JS eval
steps.observed: All squares have consistent width of 96px. Heights vary by row (80px, 92px, 109px, 125px, 109px) due to text content length — standard CSS grid auto-row behavior. Within each row, all 5 squares have identical dimensions.

domData.note: Row heights vary because CSS grid auto-rows expand to fit the tallest content in each row. This is expected and reasonable behavior — within each row, neighbors are perfectly consistent.

assertions.title: Grid has visible boundaries between squares

steps.action: Check CSS gap property on grid container
steps.expected: Visible gap or border between cells
steps.observed: Grid has gap: 8px — an 8-pixel gap between all adjacent squares providing clear visual separation

assertions.title: Board is centered on the page

steps.action: Measure grid container position relative to viewport
steps.observed: Grid container is 512px wide, positioned at 384px from viewport left. On 1280px viewport: (1280 - 512) / 2 = 384px. Grid fills its centered parent container perfectly.

steps.action: Check for button with text 'New Game'
steps.expected: A 'New Game' button is visible on the page
steps.observed: Button element with text 'New Game' found (ref @e26), distinct from the 25 board squares

steps.expected: A 'Share' button is visible on the page
steps.observed: Button element with text 'Share' found (ref @e27), distinct from the 25 board squares

steps.action: Get document.title from the game page
Check all 25 square elements are buttons with cursor: pointer
steps.expected: All squares are interactive (button elements or clickable)
steps.observed: All 25 squares are native <button> elements with cursor: pointer

steps.action: Hover over a square and take screenshot
steps.observed: Hover screenshot captured; DOM confirms cursor: pointer on all 25 squares

frictions.description: agent-browser wait --load networkidle times out on the dev server (~25s) due to Vite's hot-reload WebSocket. Used sleep 2000 instead as documented in user-testing.md.
frictions.resolution: Used sleep/delay instead of networkidle wait

frictions.description: agent-browser snapshot -i output truncates display of text containing double quotes — squares with quoted phrases appeared truncated in the snapshot output (e.g., 'Calls a viewer "' instead of 'Calls a viewer "motherfucker"'). Used JS eval (getComputedStyle/textContent) to verify full text content.
frictions.resolution: Used comprehensive JS eval via agent-browser eval --stdin to get full text content of all squares

summary: Tested 9 assertions: 9 passed, 0 failed. All board display assertions verified. The 5×5 CSS grid renders correctly with 5 equal columns of 96px, 8px gaps between cells, centered layout, and all 25 squares as clickable button elements with pointer cursors. Text is fully readable with no overflow. Row heights vary (80–125px) due to variable text length but are consistent within each row. Page title is 't3ingo — Playing'. Both 'New Game' and 'Share' buttons are present and visible. No console errors detected.
